welcome.content: 👋 Thank you for taking the time to complete this questionnaire. Your responses will help provide a holistic overview of {student_name}, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language, and sensory needs.

background_1.question: What has prompted you to seek an assessment for {student_name} at this time?

background_2.question: Which of the following areas are of concern in relation to {student_name}? (Please tick all that apply.)
background_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_3.question: Is this report required for a specific purpose?
background_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_4.question: Has any prior diagnosis previously been suggested for {student_name}?
background_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_5.question: Which type of course is {student_name} currently studying?
background_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_1.question: Who lives at home with {student_name} during term time?
family_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_2.question: Does anyone in {student_name}'s family have any of the following? (Please tick all that apply.)
family_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_3.question: Have there been any significant life events for {student_name} over the past 18 months?
family_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_4.question: Which languages are spoken in {student_name}'s home?
family_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_1.question: Was {student_name} born at full term?
dev_milestones_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_2.question: Were there any complications during the pregnancy or birth?
dev_milestones_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_3.question: As far as you are aware, did {student_name} achieve their early developmental milestones at the expected ages?
dev_milestones_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_4.question: Was {student_name}'s speech and language development noticeably delayed?
dev_milestones_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_5.question: Were there any hearing or vision concerns for {student_name} during childhood?
dev_milestones_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_6.question: Which hand does {student_name} usually write with?
dev_milestones_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_1.question: Is {student_name} currently taking any medication?
health_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_2.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s sleep quality?
health_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_3.question: Does {student_name} have any sensory sensitivities that affect their studies?
health_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_1.question: Has {student_name} changed schools at any point during their education?
education_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_2.question: If so, please describe the reasons for the move(s).

education_3.question: Have there been any periods when {student_name} was absent from school or found attendance difficult?
education_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_4.question: If so, please provide further detail.

education_5.question: Has {student_name} ever been excluded from school or placed on a reduced timetable?
education_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_6.question: If so, please provide further detail.

education_7.question: Were any concerns raised about {student_name} during primary school?
education_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_8.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s GCSE attainment profile?
education_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_9.question: Which A-Level or IB subjects is {student_name} currently studying, and what are their predicted grades?

education_10.question: How does {student_name}'s mock examination performance compare with their predicted A-Level grades?
education_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_11.question: Has {student_name} used any access arrangements at school previously?
education_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_12.question: Has {student_name} had any previous assessment by an Educational Psychologist, Specialist Teacher (SpLD), Speech and Language Therapist (SALT), Occupational Therapist (OT) or CAMHS?
education_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_13.question: Does {student_name} have, or have they ever had, an Education, Health and Care Plan (EHCP), Statement of Special Educational Needs (SEN), or Individual Education Plan (IEP)?
education_13.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_14.question: If so, when was the EHCP awarded?

education_15.question: What are {student_name}'s plans following A-Levels or Sixth Form?
education_15.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_1.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s reading speed compared with that of their peers?
literacy_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_2.question: Does {student_name} need to re-read material before it is fully understood and retained?
literacy_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_3.question: Does {student_name} experience spelling difficulties, or particular words or patterns they find challenging?
literacy_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_4.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s handwriting speed and legibility when working under time pressure?
literacy_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_5.question: Does {student_name} tend to lose track of instructions or forget where they had reached in a task?
literacy_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_6.question: Does {student_name} appear to work more slowly than their peers, even when they understand the material?
literacy_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_7.question: Is {student_name} readily distracted by external stimuli or their own thoughts during lessons?
literacy_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_8.question: Does {student_name} experience hyperfocus, that is, intense concentration on a topic that is difficult to disengage from?
literacy_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_9.question: Which specific revision techniques, if any, has {student_name} tried?
literacy_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_1.question: Which of the following methods does {student_name} typically use to take notes during lessons?
independent_learning_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section G - Independent Learning, Revision, Note-taking

independent_learning_2.question: Does {student_name} use any assistive technology?
independent_learning_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section G - Independent Learning, Revision, Note-taking

independent_learning_3.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s confidence and proficiency as a typist?
independent_learning_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section G - Independent Learning, Revision, Note-taking

independent_learning_4.question: How does {student_name} typically manage deadlines and workload?

options.label: Tend to leave to last minute

independent_learning_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section G - Independent Learning, Revision, Note-taking

independent_learning_5.question: Has {student_name} experienced burnout or sustained periods of late-night working?
independent_learning_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section G - Independent Learning, Revision, Note-taking

education_16.question: Does {student_name} currently hold any access arrangements? (Please tick all that apply.)
education_16.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_17.question: If {student_name} holds any arrangements, how long have these been their normal way of working?
education_17.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_18.question: Are you requesting any new or additional access arrangements for {student_name}?
education_18.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_19.question: Where will {student_name} sit their A-Level examinations?
education_19.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_1.question: Does {student_name} experience anxiety, low mood or other emotional wellbeing difficulties?
emotional_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_2.question: Does {student_name} experience test anxiety, such as racing thoughts or 'going blank' during examinations?
emotional_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_3.question: Does {student_name} experience stress relating to UCAS or their plans for the future?

options.label: Have not started thinking about next stage

emotional_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_4.question: Are there any concerns regarding {student_name}'s eating, weight or body image?
emotional_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_5.question: Are there any safeguarding concerns relating to {student_name}, such as self-harm or thoughts of suicide?
emotional_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_6.question: What is {student_name}'s main source of academic support?
independent_learning_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_7.question: Does {student_name} currently work with a tutor, mentor or coach?
independent_learning_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_8.question: Which specific revision techniques, if any, has {student_name} tried?
independent_learning_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_9.question: On average, how much sleep does {student_name} get during term time?
independent_learning_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_10.question: Does {student_name} rely on stimulants such as caffeine or energy drinks in order to study?
independent_learning_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_11.question: Does {student_name} have access to a quiet, dedicated study space at home?
independent_learning_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_12.question: How frequently does {student_name} work late into the night in order to meet deadlines?
independent_learning_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_13.question: Has {student_name} missed any school days or lessons as a result of wellbeing difficulties or stress?
independent_learning_13.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_14.question: Has {student_name} considered dropping a subject because they were finding it difficult?
independent_learning_14.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_15.question: Does {student_name} take part in any extracurricular activities, such as sport, music, drama or volunteering?
independent_learning_15.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_16.question: How much family support does {student_name} receive with revision and study planning?
independent_learning_16.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_17.question: Has {student_name} spoken to school staff about access arrangements or study support?
independent_learning_17.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

strengths_1.question: What are {student_name}'s interests and hobbies, and what do they enjoy doing to relax?

strengths_2.question: What are {student_name}'s strengths, as you see them?

strengths_3.question: Is there anything else you would like the assessor to know about {student_name}?

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
